description: Shared visual miniature/design-code registry for History Go and Civication entities. Data (places, people, articles) points to a designCode; renderers (Three.js, Canvas, cards, icons) decide how each code is drawn. This is a metadata/resolver layer, not geometry.

default_miniature.label: Default miniature
default_miniature.description: Generic small-building miniature used when no more specific place code applies.

stadium_miniature.label: Stadium miniature
stadium_miniature.description: Arena or stadium miniature with pitch and tribune silhouette.

sports_field_miniature.label: Sports field miniature
sports_field_miniature.description: Open sports pitch with simple field lines and goals, no stand structure.

ice_arena_miniature.label: Ice arena miniature
ice_arena_miniature.description: Low, rounded ice hall with domed roof and a hint of an ice surface.

museum_miniature.label: Museum miniature
museum_miniature.description: Wide cultural front with columns, steps and a cornice roof.

gallery_miniature.label: Gallery miniature
gallery_miniature.description: Low modern block with a skylight volume and a side wing.

theatre_miniature.label: Theatre miniature
theatre_miniature.description: Entrance front with fly tower / stage box and an awning.

opera_miniature.label: Opera miniature
opera_miniature.description: Opera house or major performing arts building with distinctive civic/cultural silhouette.

music_venue_miniature.label: Music venue miniature
music_venue_miniature.description: Darker stage house with stage tower, side volume and entrance canopy.

cinema_miniature.label: Cinema miniature
cinema_miniature.description: Cinema front with a marquee and a blank vertical blade sign.

library_miniature.label: Library miniature
library_miniature.description: Calm public building with a skylight/atrium and wide window bands.

church_miniature.label: Church miniature
church_miniature.description: Nave with tower and spire plus an entrance front.

school_miniature.label: School miniature
school_miniature.description: Low school wing with a schoolyard and a simple roof.

university_miniature.label: University miniature
university_miniature.description: Wide institutional building with wings, entrance and inner courtyard.

station_miniature.label: Station miniature
station_miniature.description: Long hall with a barrel roof and a hint of platform and tracks.

park_miniature.label: Park miniature
park_miniature.description: Green surface with small trees, a path and a bench.

playground_miniature.label: Playground miniature
playground_miniature.description: Sand surface with a climbing frame, slide and swing.

square_miniature.label: Square miniature
square_miniature.description: Open plaza with low surrounding buildings and a small statue, tree and bench.

street_miniature.label: Street miniature
street_miniature.description: Narrow street surface with rows of houses on the sides.

fortress_miniature.label: Fortress miniature
fortress_miniature.description: Stone base with corner towers, walls and a bailey.

palace_miniature.label: Palace miniature
palace_miniature.description: Palace, royal residence or formal representative building.

monument_miniature.label: Monument miniature
monument_miniature.description: Standalone monument, memorial, statue or symbolic marker.

farm_estate_miniature.label: Farm estate miniature
farm_estate_miniature.description: Historic farm, manor, estate or older rural property.

prison_miniature.label: Prison miniature
prison_miniature.description: Prison, detention site or penal institution.

civic_miniature.label: Civic miniature
civic_miniature.description: Public core building with base, tower volume, steps and columns.

waterfront_miniature.label: Waterfront miniature
waterfront_miniature.description: Quay, pier, a small building and a little boat.

industrial_miniature.label: Industrial miniature
industrial_miniature.description: Low warehouse hall with a gate, chimney and ventilation blocks.

commerce_miniature.label: Commerce miniature
commerce_miniature.description: Shopfront with an awning, door, shop windows and a blank sign.

apartment_block_miniature.label: Apartment block miniature
apartment_block_miniature.description: Residential block with a roof cap, door and window rhythm.

subculture_miniature.label: Subculture miniature
subculture_miniature.description: Rawer form with skate/ramp, wall and stage-like volumes.

person_default_miniature.label: Person miniature
person_default_miniature.description: Generic person design code used when no more specific profile applies.

person_writer_miniature.label: Writer miniature
person_writer_miniature.description: Person design code for writers, authors and prose figures.

person_poet_miniature.label: Poet miniature
person_poet_miniature.description: Person design code for poets and lyrical writers.

person_artist_miniature.label: Artist miniature
person_artist_miniature.description: Person design code for visual artists, painters and sculptors.

person_musician_miniature.label: Musician miniature
person_musician_miniature.description: Person design code for musicians, composers and band members.

person_actor_miniature.label: Actor miniature
person_actor_miniature.description: Person design code for actors and stage/screen performers.

person_director_miniature.label: Director miniature
person_director_miniature.description: Person design code for directors and filmmakers.

person_athlete_miniature.label: Athlete miniature
person_athlete_miniature.description: Person design code for general athletes and sports figures.

person_coach_miniature.label: Coach miniature
person_coach_miniature.description: Person design code for coaches, managers and tactical sport leaders.

person_skater_miniature.label: Skater miniature
person_skater_miniature.description: Person design code for speed skaters, figure skaters and ice-skating profiles.

person_footballer_miniature.label: Footballer miniature
person_footballer_miniature.description: Person design code for footballers and pitch-based sports profiles.

person_runner_miniature.label: Runner miniature
person_runner_miniature.description: Person design code for runners, athletics figures and movement-focused sports profiles.

person_skier_miniature.label: Skier miniature
person_skier_miniature.description: Person design code for skiers and winter-sport profiles.

person_politician_miniature.label: Politician miniature
person_politician_miniature.description: Person design code for politicians and elected figures.

person_activist_miniature.label: Activist miniature
person_activist_miniature.description: Person design code for activists and movement figures.

person_scientist_miniature.label: Scientist miniature
person_scientist_miniature.description: Person design code for scientists and researchers.

person_teacher_miniature.label: Teacher miniature
person_teacher_miniature.description: Person design code for teachers, educators and pedagogues.

person_explorer_miniature.label: Explorer miniature
person_explorer_miniature.description: Person design code for explorers, expedition figures and adventurers.

person_historical_miniature.label: Historical person miniature
person_historical_miniature.description: Person design code for historical figures from earlier eras.

person_architect_miniature.label: Architect miniature
person_architect_miniature.description: Person design code for architects, planners and urban form thinkers.

person_urban_planner_miniature.label: Urban planner miniature
person_urban_planner_miniature.description: Person design code for city planners, municipal planners and urban development figures.

person_business_miniature.label: Business miniature
person_business_miniature.description: Person design code for business owners, industrialists, entrepreneurs and finance figures.

person_local_legend_miniature.label: Local legend miniature
person_local_legend_miniature.description: Person design code for local legends and neighbourhood figures.

article_default_miniature.label: Article miniature
article_default_miniature.description: Generic article/knowledge design code used when no more specific topic applies.

article_history_miniature.label: History article miniature
article_history_miniature.description: Knowledge design code for historical articles and stories.

article_sports_history_miniature.label: Sports history article miniature
article_sports_history_miniature.description: Knowledge design code for sports history articles and groundhopper stories.

article_music_history_miniature.label: Music history article miniature
article_music_history_miniature.description: Knowledge design code for music history articles and stories.

article_literature_miniature.label: Literature article miniature
article_literature_miniature.description: Knowledge design code for literature articles, essays and reading trails.

article_art_miniature.label: Art article miniature
article_art_miniature.description: Knowledge design code for art articles and gallery stories.

article_architecture_miniature.label: Architecture article miniature
article_architecture_miniature.description: Knowledge design code for architecture and built-heritage articles.

article_political_history_miniature.label: Political history article miniature
article_political_history_miniature.description: Knowledge design code for political history articles and stories.

article_local_story_miniature.label: Local story miniature
article_local_story_miniature.description: Knowledge design code for local stories and neighbourhood narratives.

article_place_essay_miniature.label: Place essay miniature
article_place_essay_miniature.description: Knowledge design code for place-focused essays and main place articles.

article_institution_miniature.label: Institution article miniature
article_institution_miniature.description: Article design code for institutions such as schools, hospitals, prisons, public offices and civic organizations.

article_memory_place_miniature.label: Memory place article miniature
article_memory_place_miniature.description: Article design code for memory places, memorial landscapes, cemeteries and traumatic or commemorative history.

article_people_portrait_miniature.label: People portrait miniature
article_people_portrait_miniature.description: Knowledge design code for biographical portraits and people-focused articles.

article_biography_miniature.label: Biography article miniature
article_biography_miniature.description: Article design code for biography, life story or person-focused historical entry.

article_groundhopper_miniature.label: Groundhopper article miniature
article_groundhopper_miniature.description: Knowledge design code for groundhopper articles, stadium guides and arena stories.

article_wonderkammer_miniature.label: Wonderkammer article miniature
article_wonderkammer_miniature.description: Knowledge design code for AHA/wonderkammer curiosities and cabinet-of-wonders pieces.

article_language_miniature.label: Language article miniature
article_language_miniature.description: Knowledge design code for language articles, etymology and dialect stories.

article_object_story_miniature.label: Object story miniature
article_object_story_miniature.description: Knowledge design code for object-focused stories and artefact narratives.

article_nature_route_miniature.label: Nature route article miniature
article_nature_route_miniature.description: Article design code for nature routes, rivers, trails, green corridors and landscape-based place reading.

article_media_history_miniature.label: Media history article miniature
article_media_history_miniature.description: Article design code for journalism, newspapers, broadcasting, media houses and public media culture.

article_transport_miniature.label: Transport article miniature
article_transport_miniature.description: Article design code for public transport, stations, mobility systems and transport history.

article_urban_infrastructure_miniature.label: Urban infrastructure article miniature
article_urban_infrastructure_miniature.description: Article design code for roads, bridges, utilities, water systems, technical infrastructure and large urban systems.

article_industry_miniature.label: Industry article miniature
article_industry_miniature.description: Article design code for factories, workshops, breweries, production sites and industrial history.

article_religion_miniature.label: Religion article miniature
article_religion_miniature.description: Article design code for religious practice, congregations, sacred spaces and faith history.

article_science_history_miniature.label: Science history article miniature
article_science_history_miniature.description: Article design code for science history, research cultures, academic disciplines and knowledge institutions.

article_food_market_miniature.label: Food and market article miniature
article_food_market_miniature.description: Article design code for food markets, market halls, street markets, food culture and everyday commerce.

article_childhood_play_miniature.label: Childhood and play article miniature
article_childhood_play_miniature.description: Article design code for playgrounds, childhood place use, play culture and children's activity spaces.
